pages.text: $(bold)The world is bigger.$()$(br2)Stacked overhauls: $(item)Tectonic$() reshapes terrain; $(item)Regions Unexplored$(), $(item)Oh The Biomes We've Gone$(), $(item)Nature's Spirit$(), $(item)Autumnity$(), $(item)Environmental$() all add biomes on top.$(br2)Walking far enough gets you somewhere new.

$(bold)Structures everywhere.$()$(br2)$(item)YUNG's$() series overhauls dungeons, mineshafts, fortresses, strongholds, and the End island. $(item)Dungeons & Taverns$(), $(item)Repurposed Structures$(), $(item)Valhelsia Structures$(), $(item)Towns and Towers$(), $(item)Tidal Towns$() all scatter their own.$(br2)Worth exploring instead of mining straight down.

$(bold)The Nether and End.$()$(br2)$(item)Incendium$() rebuilds the Nether end to end. $(item)YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses$() and $(item)YUNG's Better End Island$() overhaul the late-game structures.$(br2)Both dimensions reward going in prepared.
